shipRecommendationReason: This is a narrow local data-validation hardening that prevents malformed ticket files from surfacing as blank ticket records. It does not create a standalone release reason, but I see no higher-level blocker to shipping it with the functional-labs train once Sebastian approves that train.
bugsFixedByCodexReview: Expanded the malformed ticket regression from missing ticket_id only to missing, blank, and non-string ticket_id fixtures so the production guard has direct proof for the residual risk named in the PR body.
